summary: This is a personal biography and lifestyle interview with real estate agent Mia Tidwell. While Mia works in residential real estate in San Diego and Los Angeles, the conversation focuses on her diverse career path (casting director, TV host, matchmaker, bartender, cosmetologist) rather than multifamily deal analysis, underwriting, or investment strategies relevant to Brian's 15-50 unit value-add focus.
takeaways: No specific deal-sourcing tactics or underwriting thresholds provided
Discussion of residential sales emotional factors (views, amenities drive buyer decisions) rather than multifamily cap rates or NOI analysis
Mention of working for free for one year to prove value to broker Seth Oburn as a relationship-building tactic
Philosophy: 'stick to the basics—make people feel good, create relationships' in real estate
Home renovation consultant approach: offer seller choice between as-is sale price vs. renovation-funded sale at higher price (e.g., $1M as-is → $1.2M after $20K kitchen upgrade)
Mentioned owning investment properties and doing flips with partner Seth, but no specifics on acquisition criteria or analysis method
Goal for 2024: buy one investment property in Los Angeles for rental income diversification
title: Mia Tidwell | HGTV & Real Estate | Abundance2Give
